question: Will the amount of money loaned as part of the Bank Term Funding Program have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-04-13?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/H41RESPPALDKNWW once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-04-13 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-04-03) was 0.000. (The latest value released in Assets: Liquidity and Credit Facilities: Loans: Bank Term Funding Program, Net: Wednesday Level from the release H.4.1 Factors Affecting Reserve Balances.)
background:
The notes from the release: For questions on the data, please contact the data source: https://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/ContactUs/feedback.aspx?refurl=/releases/h41/%
For questions on FRED functionality, please contact: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/contactus/.  The notes from the series: N/A.
